seoTitle: Teal Flat vs Templers — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Teal Flat and Templers. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Teal Flat vs Templers: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Teal Flat and Templers.
heading: Teal Flat vs Templers — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Teal Flat, South Australia and Templers, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Templers has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Teal Flat (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Teal Flat or Templers safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Teal Flat has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Templers scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Teal Flat scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Templers scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Teal Flat or Templers?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Templers has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.93% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
